name: reference-compiler-cli
tagline: Explains the architecture and mental model of Angular's compiler-cli (ngtsc) to orient work in that package.
verdict: Clean, well-scoped reference document with a strong mandatory trigger and concrete, specific content (real class/file names, compilation phases); no security concerns. Its only gap is the total absence of any version or changelog signal, so consumers can't tell if it changed since they trusted it.

highlights.summary: No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in the file.
